ogTitle: Kundle Kundle vs Kungala: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kundle Kundle and Kungala.
heading: Kundle Kundle vs Kungala — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kundle Kundle, New South Wales and Kungala, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kungala has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Kundle Kundle (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kundle Kundle or Kungala safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kundle Kundle has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Kungala scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kundle Kundle scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Kungala scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kundle Kundle or Kungala?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kungala has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
